entries.task: admin panel single url relocation feature moved to admin path
entries.solution:
[SupremeAI Core — Admin Panel URL Relocation]

PROBLEM: All admin features were accessible via client-side routing within the dashboard at various paths.

SOLUTION: Relocated all admin features under a single URL path `/admin/*`.

CHANGES MADE:
1. Created new AdminRouteLayout component with sidebar/header navigation
2. Updated App.tsx routing to use `/admin/*` routes with nested Outlet
3. Root URL `/` now redirects to `/admin/dashboard`
4. Added `getMenuPath()` helper in DashboardConfigs for consistent path generation

NEW URL STRUCTURE:
- /admin/dashboard - Main dashboard
- /admin/ai - Neural chat
- /admin/projects - Deployments
- /admin/providers - AI providers
- /admin/users - User management
- /admin/monitoring - System monitoring
- /admin/learning - Knowledge dashboard
- /admin/security - Security management
- /admin/work-rules - Work rules
- /admin/rules - System rules
- /admin/analytics - Analytics
- /admin/logs - System logs
- /admin/vpn - VPN config
- /admin/browser - Browser
- /admin/auto-browser - Auto browser
- /admin/quotas - Quota management
- /admin/simulator - Simulator
- /admin/reverse-engineering - Reverse engineering
- /admin/notifications - Notifications
- /admin/reports - Reports
- /admin/performance - Performance
- /admin/backup - Backup
- /admin/ocr - OCR tool
- /admin/infrastructure - Infrastructure
- /admin/code-analysis - Code intelligence
- /admin/settings - Settings

VERIFICATION: Build completed successfully. All admin features accessible at single URL.
